title: Hiring Store Manager at Starbucks India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Starbucks India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Starbucks India International Enterprises! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Indore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Starbucks India International Enterprises:
Starbucks India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Starbucks India International Enterprises!
